jsonLd.title: Easyday is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Easyday! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Easyday:
Easyday is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Easyday!
